zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Knt John de Maunsell於1399年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle24歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Turberville25歲。他於1420年與Lady Cecily De Cantelupe結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1471年在英國格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓 金斯享年72歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓 金斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Knt John de Maunsell于1399年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle24岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Turberville25岁。他于1420年与Lady Cecily De Cantelupe结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1471年在英国格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓 金斯享年72岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾查爾頓 金斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Knt John de Maunsell was born in 1399, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle, was 24 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Turberville, was 25. He married Lady Cecily De Cantelupe in 1420. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1471, in Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Oxwich Castle, Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales: Oxwich, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Knt John de Maunsell est né en 1399, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Turberville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecily De Cantelupe en 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1471, à Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.of Maunsel, North Petherton, Somersetshi: North Petherton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Knt John de Maunsell 1399 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle 24 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Turberville 25. Er hat 1420 Lady Cecily De Cantelupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1471 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knt John de Maunsell è nato il nel 1399 nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Turberville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Cecily De Cantelupe nel 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1471, nel Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Knt John de Maunsellが1399年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castleは24歳，母Lady Elizabeth Turbervilleは25歳であった。1420年にLady Cecily De Cantelupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1471年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャールトン キングズで72歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャールトン キングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knt John de Maunsell(이)가 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Turberville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1420년 Lady Cecily De Cantelupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1471년 영국 그루스스터실르 찰턴 킨그스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 찰턴 킨그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knt John de Maunsell nasceu em 1399, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Turberville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecily De Cantelupe em 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1471, em Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Knt John de Maunsell родился в 1399 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Turberville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecily De Cantelupe в 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1471 г. в местности чарлтон кингс, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности чарлтон кингс, глоусестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Cecily De Cantelupe en 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
